Intraday post (09/July)

Here is the weekly/monthly postAnd here is my very recent educational post about trading. Part 2 is coming soon…

INTRADAY POSTCoding today’s positioning:

We have a clear short risk reversal pattern for today. Its centroid falls at 6231.54; this will decide which side will effect the spot (downside magnetic gamma gravity, or upside gamma vacuum). If upside, we should see vol up dynamics and acceleration in the 6242-6261.88 zone, otherwise the spot will be pushed out of this local regime. At ‘61, I would take some profit. On the upside, we have a very strong vanna flip at 6273.Same to the downside. And coding 6198 as a very strong support.

If the price can hold below 6210/13 into the power hour, the downside can pin.If it is above 6218/20 in the last hour, we can see a quick spike towards 6245 and then back to 6230.If the spot is above the centroid and even 6246 after 2.40pm, the price action will pretty much be trapped. In this range of 6255/6243, but not pinned! Here, even a quick charm-to-gamma squeeze is also possible.Nice setup for reversion trades during the AM.

The momentum metrics also agree with me:

The daily centroids are coincidencing with the output of the momentum metric, that shows which average price should be performed during a timeperiod in order to confirm the positive direction or negative direction of the balancing. I attached the weekly tenor output.

OptionsDepth Heatmap

(Description is here)
